title: [Moore] Assertion in MooreToCore when module uses packed union type as port

features.name: packed union type as module port
features.description: Code should include a module with input and output ports that use a packed union type
features.snippet: typedef union packed { logic [31:0] a; logic [31:0] b; } my_union; module Sub(input my_union in_val, output my_union out_val); endmodule
